name: Bioinformatics Lead (Add Name)
bio: Coordinates computational strategy, pipeline architecture, and integrative analysis for pathogen genomics and metagenomics projects.

name: Bioinformatics Specialist (Add Name)
bio: Develops and maintains analysis workflows for WGS, 16S profiling, and comparative genomic interpretation.

name: Clinical Microbiologist (Add Name)
bio: Provides clinical interpretation context, sample metadata guidance, and microbiology domain expertise.

name: Clinical Microbiologist (Add Name)
bio: Supports collaborative research design and alignment of genomic findings with clinical microbiology objectives.

name: Biologist Collaborator (Add Name)
bio: Contributes biological validation strategy, wet-lab integration, and interpretation across cross-institution projects.

name: Biologist Collaborator (Add Name)
bio: Supports experimental design, biological contextualization, and collaborative manuscript development.
